---
name: "Bug Report (Easy Form)"
about: "Report a bug using plain language. No coding knowledge needed."
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## What were you trying to do?

Tell us what you were doing in the game right before the issue happened.

## What happened instead?

Describe what went wrong.

## What did you expect to happen?

Describe what you thought should happen.

## Does this happen every time?

- [ ] Yes, every time
- [ ] Sometimes
- [ ] Only happened once

## Can you reproduce it?

If yes, list the steps in simple terms:

1. 
2. 
3. 

## Where did this happen?

- [ ] Single-player world
- [ ] Multiplayer server
- [ ] Both
- [ ] Not sure

## Game Setup

Please fill in what you can:

- Waterlogged version:
- Minecraft version:
- Fabric or NeoForge:
- Any other mods you remember using:

## Optional: Screenshots or Video

If you can, add screenshots or a short clip. This helps a lot.

## Optional: Crash Message

If the game showed an error screen, paste the message here (or type a short summary).
